message:
audit: diff batch 384 + deep re-audit batch 385 — 12 files, all SOUND

Batch 384 (diff audit HEAD~5): 7 files, ~278 lines — encoding.rs
config validation, grpc loopback enforcement, worker channel state
machine, raptorq overflow-safe prime, runtime builder WASM docs.

Batch 385 (deep re-audit): worker_channel.rs (1814L), grpc/client.rs
(1539L), encoding.rs (1043L) — state machine transitions, URI
validation, streaming/sink mutex patterns, block splitting, repair
generation. All SOUND, 0 bugs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
